docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS PAUL SARMIENTO. DEFENDANT MARGARET PINTER DYNASTY TRUST IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
